4:T57a,(function(){var PARAM='__pd_reload';var KEY='privatedao-next-asset-recovery:'+(window.location.pathname||'/');function nextAsset(url){return typeof url==='string'&&url.indexOf('/_next/static/')!==-1;}function once(){try{if(window.sessionStorage.getItem(KEY)==='1'){return false;}window.sessionStorage.setItem(KEY,'1');return true;}catch(_){return true;}}function hardReload(){if(!once()){return;}var url=new URL(window.location.href);url.searchParams.set(PARAM,String(Date.now()));window.location.replace(url.toString());}function maybeRecover(value){var message='';if(typeof value==='string'){message=value;}else if(value&&typeof value.message==='string'){message=value.message;}else if(value&&typeof value.reason==='string'){message=value.reason;}if(message.indexOf('ChunkLoadError')!==-1||message.indexOf('Loading CSS chunk')!==-1||message.indexOf('Failed to fetch dynamically imported module')!==-1){hardReload();}}window.addEventListener('error',function(event){var target=event.target;if(target&&nextAsset(target.src||target.href)){hardReload();}},true);window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection',function(event){maybeRecover(event.reason);});if(window.location.search.indexOf(PARAM+'=')!==-1){window.addEventListener('load',function(){var url=new URL(window.location.href);url.searchParams.delete(PARAM);window.history.replaceState(window.history.state,'',url.toString());},{once:true});}})();0:{"P":null,"c":["","viewer","security-architecture",""],"q":"","i":false,"f":[[["",{"children":["viewer",{"children":[["slug","security-architecture","c",null],{"children":["__PAGE__",{}]}]}]},"$undefined","$undefined",16],[["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","link","0",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/chunks/11fii1qfatvp_.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","link","1",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/chunks/00~a4cfihy7j3.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0wi11rh25l7c_.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-1",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0shhd6kjmka31.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-2",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0f6kvf~_~fcr7.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-3",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/01v-109x2_k5o.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-4",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0i.l9589uvx0j.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-5",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0is5p.edcm0hi.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-6",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0v5jhj7c24q78.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-7",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0j4pbljnny6-v.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}]],["$","html",null,{"lang":"en","className":"space_grotesk_d7b50fc5-module__qeW00a__variable Governance Access Layer"}]}],["$","$1","block-6",{"children":["$","pre","c-38",{"className":"overflow-x-auto rounded-3xl border border-white/8 bg-black/35 p-5 text-xs leading-7 text-cyan-100 sm:text-sm","children":["$","code",null,{"children":"User\n  -> Token Ownership\n  -> Proposal Eligibility\n  -> Governance Lifecycle"}]}]}],["$","$1","block-7",{"children":["$","p","p-41",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"The token operates as the governance access layer:"}]}],["$","$1","block-8",{"children":["$","ul","l-48",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-48-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"token ownership gates structured participation"}],["$","li","l-48-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"proposal eligibility becomes accountable instead of open-ended"}],["$","li","l-48-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"lifecycle access stays aligned with governance identity"}],["$","li","l-48-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"treasury outcomes remain tied to governed participation"}]]}]}],["$","$1","block-9",{"children":["$","h2","h2-51",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"3. Account Binding Map"}]}],["$","$1","block-10",{"children":["$","pre","c-58",{"className":"overflow-x-auto rounded-3xl border border-white/8 bg-black/35 p-5 text-xs leading-7 text-cyan-100 sm:text-sm","children":["$","code",null,{"children":"DAO\n├── Proposal\n│   ├── VoterRecord\n│   ├── DelegationRecord\n│   └── TreasuryAction\n└── Treasury PDA"}]}]}],["$","$1","block-11",{"children":["$","h2","h2-63",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"4. Signer Flow"}]}],["$","$1","block-12",{"children":["$","pre","c-70",{"className":"overflow-x-auto rounded-3xl border border-white/8 bg-black/35 p-5 text-xs leading-7 text-cyan-100 sm:text-sm","children":["$","code",null,{"children":"Authority signer\n  -> initialize_dao\n  -> cancel_proposal\n  -> veto_proposal\n\nGovernance token holder\n  -> create_proposal\n  -> commit_vote\n  -> reveal_vote\n\nDelegator\n  -> delegate_vote\n\nDelegatee\n  -> commit_delegated_vote\n\nKeeper\n  -> reveal_vote (only if authorized at commit time)\n\nPermissionless finalizer / executor\n  -> finalize_proposal\n  -> execute_proposal"}]}]}],"$L23","$L24","$L25","$L26","$L27","$L28","$L29","$L2a","$L2b","$L2c","$L2d","$L2e","$L2f","$L30","$L31","$L32","$L33","$L34","$L35","$L36","$L37","$L38","$L39","$L3a"]}]}]}]
23:["$","$1","block-13",{"children":["$","h2","h2-75",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"5. Treasury Structure"}]}]
24:["$","$1","block-14",{"children":["$","pre","c-82",{"className":"overflow-x-auto rounded-3xl border border-white/8 bg-black/35 p-5 text-xs leading-7 text-cyan-100 sm:text-sm","children":["$","code",null,{"children":"DAO\n  -> Treasury PDA\n      -> SOL balance\n      -> optional SPL token accounts\n\nProposal\n  -> TreasuryAction\n      -> action type\n      -> amount\n      -> recipient\n      -> optional token mint"}]}]}]
25:["$","$1","block-15",{"children":["$","h2","h2-87",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"6. Replay Boundaries"}]}]
26:["$","$1","block-16",{"children":["$","pre","c-94",{"className":"overflow-x-auto rounded-3xl border border-white/8 bg-black/35 p-5 text-xs leading-7 text-cyan-100 sm:text-sm","children":["$","code",null,{"children":"Commit\n  -> one voter record per proposal/voter\n  -> has_committed blocks replay\n\nReveal\n  -> has_revealed blocks replay\n  -> vote bound to commitment and voter pubkey\n\nFinalize\n  -> non-Voting status blocks replay\n\nExecute\n  -> is_executed blocks replay\n  -> timelock and binding checks block premature or confused replays"}]}]}]
27:["$","$1","block-17",{"children":["$","h2","h2-99",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"7. Security Layers"}]}]

2a:["$","$1","block-20",{"children":["$","h3","h3-114",{"className":"text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-xl","children":"Layer 2 — Signer Enforcement"}]}]

2c:["$","$1","block-22",{"children":["$","h3","h3-125",{"className":"text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-xl","children":"Layer 3 — Account Binding"}]}]
